title: A Shadow in the Alley
content: Returning home after dinner, Mia noticed a tall shadow moving slowly through a narrow alley. She stopped and watched carefully, unsure whether someone was following her. Gathering her courage, she walked closer while staying in a well-lit area. The mysterious figure suddenly became clear. A large advertising banner was gently swinging in the wind, casting a moving shadow beneath the streetlights. The experience reminded her how darkness and imagination can easily transform ordinary objects into something much more mysterious.
